prompt: Add PostgreSQL full-text search for blog posts without Elasticsearch

turns.content:
<task>
Add full-text search for blog posts using PostgreSQL's built-in full-text search instead of adding Elasticsearch.
</task>

1	 from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, Text, DateTime
2	 from database import Base
3	 
4	 class Post(Base):
5	     __tablename__ = 'posts'
6	     id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
7	     title = Column(String(300))
8	     body = Column(Text)
9	     author_id = Column(Integer)
10	     published_at = Column(DateTime)

arguments.query: PostgreSQL full-text search tsvector tsquery SQLAlchemy Python

turns.content:
1. PostgreSQL Full Text Search - https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/textsearch.html
   Use tsvector column with GIN index. Search with to_tsquery and @@ operator.
2. SQLAlchemy PostgreSQL Full Text Search - https://docs.sqlalchemy.org/en/20/dialects/postgresql.html#full-text-search
   func.to_tsvector, func.to_tsquery, .match() method.

arguments.title: PostgreSQL full-text search setup
arguments.content:
1. Add tsvector column: ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN search_vector tsvector
2. GIN index: CREATE INDEX idx_search ON posts USING GIN (search_vector)
3. Auto-update trigger: tsvector_update_trigger(search_vector, 'english', title, body)
4. Search: WHERE search_vector @@ websearch_to_tsquery('english', 'user query')
5. Ranking: ORDER BY ts_rank(search_vector, query) DESC
websearch_to_tsquery handles natural language queries with quotes and operators

turns.content: Finding recorded: PostgreSQL full-text search setup

arguments.summary: Researched PostgreSQL FTS. Will add tsvector column with GIN index, trigger for auto-update, and search query function.

next_steps.description: Create Alembic migration adding search_vector column, GIN index, and update trigger
Add search_posts function to src/services/post_service.py using websearch_to_tsquery

arguments.content:
"""Add full-text search vector to posts

Revision ID: 003_search_vector
"""
from alembic import op


def upgrade():
    op.execute("ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN search_vector tsvector")
    op.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_posts_search ON posts USING GIN (search_vector)")
    op.execute("""
        CREATE TRIGGER posts_search_update BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON posts
        FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION
        tsvector_update_trigger(search_vector, 'pg_catalog.english', title, body)
    """)
    # Backfill existing rows
    op.execute("""
        UPDATE posts SET search_vector =
        to_tsvector('english', coalesce(title, '') || ' ' || coalesce(body, ''))
    """)


def downgrade():
    op.execute("DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS posts_search_update ON posts")
    op.execute("DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_posts_search")
    op.execute("ALTER TABLE posts DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS search_vector")

turns.content:

4

6	     return Post.query.order_by(Post.published_at.desc()).limit(limit).all()
Added content after line 6 in src/services/post_service.py

arguments.message: Full-text search is implemented using PostgreSQL native FTS. Run the migration to add the search_vector column and GIN index. Existing posts will be backfilled. New posts are auto-indexed via the trigger. The search function uses websearch_to_tsquery which supports natural language queries like `"exact phrase" -excluded`.

arguments.summary: Added PostgreSQL full-text search: migration with tsvector column, GIN index, auto-update trigger, backfill. Search function uses websearch_to_tsquery with ts_rank ordering.
arguments.final_answer: PostgreSQL full-text search added without external dependencies. Migration creates tsvector column with GIN index and auto-update trigger. search_posts() uses websearch_to_tsquery for natural language queries with relevance ranking.
